project.name: Studio Weave
project.tagline: Friday handoff pack for a README-first AI micro-tool.
project.objective: Ship a polished weekly drop without losing context between discovery, build, review, and publish.

baton.promise: Every handoff should preserve the brief, risks, proof, and next action.

signals.label: browser-use
signals.note: Browser agents are still compounding fast.

signals.label: Mastra
signals.note: Frameworks are packaging agents and workflows as products.

signals.label: n8n
signals.note: Workflow automation is converging with AI agents.

stages.name: capture-brief
stages.label: Capture Brief
stages.goal: Turn public repo signals into one small shippable direction.
stages.note: Relay Baton won on novelty and publishability.

stages.name: build-artifact
stages.label: Build Artifact
stages.goal: Generate a polished handoff pack from one manifest.
stages.note: Keep the scope small and the outputs commit-friendly.

stages.name: verify-artifacts
stages.label: Verify Artifacts
stages.goal: Confirm tests, coverage, README lead, and dist outputs.
stages.note: Keep the lead product-first and push notes to the appendix.

stages.name: publish-main
stages.label: Publish to Main
stages.goal: Commit the weekly drop and push origin/main.

checks.label: Node tests
checks.note: Core scoring and renderers are covered.

checks.label: README lead
checks.note: Top stays product-first; update log lives in the appendix.

blockers.label: Push gate still pending
blockers.note: Wait for the verification pass before publishing.

handoff.ask: Review the generated outputs, confirm the diff is clean, and push the weekly drop.
handoff.nextMessage: Verification is nearly done. Keep the README lead product-first, leave the update notes in the appendix, then push.
